title: tilia eburnea var. lasioclada
intro: Tilia eburnea var. lasioclada, also known as the American white basswood, is a deciduous tree species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of Tilia eburnea var. lasioclada include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
